subject: [PATCH v3 25/28] nfsd: add the filehandle to returned attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new routine to compose a filehandle for use in CB_NOTIFY operations, which do not have access to the usual svc_export and require only a parent filehandle and nfs4_file. The new routine is used to fill out the fhandle field in the nfsd4_fattr_args structure. This allows the filehandle to be included in the attributes returned by CB_NOTIFY requests.
